title: storage: fix broken fgetxattr call
body:
As documented in the open man page O_PATH is not valid for fgetxattr() and fails with EBADF.

Fixes: 363943ac4b ("storage, overlay: use openat2 instead of using procfs")

<!--- Please read the [contributing guidelines](https://github.com/containers/container-libs/blob/main/CONTRIBUTING.md) before proceeding --->

comments.body: Thanks! Do I understand correctly that this broke some Podman tests? If not, we have a testing gap.

> Thanks! Do I understand correctly that this broke some Podman tests?

… yes, per https://github.com/containers/container-libs/pull/820#issuecomment-4387123665 .
